chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 822 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3644/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.3645/2025 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 17.06.2025 Mr. Qaimuddin Malano, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. At the very outset, learned Counsel for the petitioner submits that as per Notification No. DD(E&I)/HQ/BOR/2024.302 dated 21.10.2024, issued by Government of Sindh, the petitioner will approach to the Deputy Commissioner concerned for redressal of his grievance i.e. demarcation of the agricultural land; therefore, under instructions, he does not press this petition. Accordingly, the instant petition is dismissed as not pressed along with the listed application, leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail the appropriate remedy available to him, in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
